managelidar 0.1.5

    • How to use the functions

Propagate a new extent up the STAC tree

Source: R/stac_functions.R
propagate_extent_to_ancestors.Rd

Walks up the chain of parent links starting from collection_path, updating each ancestor collection's extent to account for the new items just added lower in the tree. Stops once it reaches a Catalog (which has no extent field) or runs out of parent links.

Usage

propagate_extent_to_ancestors(collection_path, spatial_extent, temporal_extent)

Arguments

collection_path

Path to the collection whose ancestors should be updated (typically the collection items were just added to).

spatial_extent

Spatial extent of the newly added items (list format, as returned by extract_spatial_extent()).

temporal_extent

Temporal extent of the newly added items (list format, as returned by extract_temporal_extent()).

Value

Invisible NULL
